description: Characterize the optical resolution of the microscope system by measuring the Point Spread Function (PSF) using the bead image at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/psf_beads/bead_field.tif. Calibrate the image using a pixel size of 0.1625 µm/pixel. Determine the Full Width at Half Maximum (FWHM) for at least five isolated bead-like features. Record the results in ~/Fiji_Data/results/psf/fwhm_measurements.csv including columns for bead_id, fwhm_pixels, fwhm_um, and peak_intensity. Additionally, export a representative line profile plot to ~/Fiji_Data/results/psf/line_profile.png and a summary report containing the mean lateral resolution (mean FWHM in µm) to ~/Fiji_Data/results/psf/resolution_report.txt.
